name: Snackbar
description: A snackbar gives brief, low-priority feedback about an action just taken — "Vehicle saved", "Export started" — usually with a single optional action like Undo. It appears briefly and dismisses on its own.
keyRule: Use a snackbar for transient confirmation that doesn't need acknowledgement. For a message that must persist until acted on, use a banner; for a blocking choice, a dialog.

variants.name: Error toast
variants.whenToUse: A brief failure notice; pair persistent errors with a banner instead.

behaviors.name: Auto-dismiss
behaviors.description: Auto-hides after a few seconds; an action or hover can pause/extend it so it isn't missed.

behaviors.name: One at a time
behaviors.description: Show a single snackbar; queue subsequent ones rather than stacking.

behaviors.name: Single action
behaviors.description: At most one action; don't put critical, irreversible choices in a transient surface.

states.treatment: Dark surface, light text, optional action.

specs.value: primary-light (#FFA863) — light enough to read on the dark surface

props.name: variant
props.description: Message only = simple confirmation. With action = one quick follow-up. Error toast = brief failure notice.

props.name: open
props.description: Whether the snackbar is currently shown.

props.name: message
props.description: One concise line of text, e.g. "Vehicle saved".

props.name: actionLabel
props.description: At most one action label, e.g. "Undo".

props.name: onAction
props.description: Called when the action button is activated.

props.name: onClose
props.description: Called when the snackbar is dismissed (timeout or explicit close).

doThis: Keep the message to one short line.
Offer at most one action (e.g. Undo).
Queue snackbars; show one at a time.
dontDoThis: Don't use a snackbar for errors that need action — use a banner/dialog.
Don't auto-dismiss something the user must act on.
accessibility: Announce via a polite live region (assertive only for important messages).
If there's an action, give enough time or pause on hover/focus so it's reachable.
The action is a real button with an accessible name.

related.name: Banner
related.why: Persistent messages that must not auto-dismiss
